working_on.task: Resolve 'adb not found' error and improve multi-OS support
working_on.notes: Implemented intelligent environment scanning for Android SDK and Java on both Linux and Windows. Added exec.LookPath fallback for adb.

pending_tasks.task: Add support for multiple connected devices selection for Install
Implement build history or recent projects list
Integrate auto-detection logic into project startup check

recent_changes.description: Resolved 'adb not found' error in Linux environment
Added multi-path scanning for Android SDK/Java Home on Windows and Linux
Implemented exec.LookPath fallback for system-wide ADB detection

decisions_made.reason: Linux GUI apps often don't inherit terminal environment variables
Support users who install adb via package managers outside of SDK
